requestedAction: Merge exactly one reviewed pull request: gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system#1 into main.
scope: This approval allows AG OS to use GitHub MCP for exactly one live target repository merge: merge pull request #1 in gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system into main. The merge is allowed only if PR #82 is already merged into AG OS main, AG OS main matches origin/main, the AG OS review records exist in main, target PR #1 is still open and mergeable, the target PR head SHA matches the reviewed head SHA bf57520a6b08bf5fab9986adc2c9f7ae54b1e5bf, the changed file set remains exactly README.md, package.json, index.html, src/main.js, src/styles.css, src/data/templates.js, src/lib/safety.js, and src/lib/status.js, and AG OS validation, boot check, and runtime tests pass immediately before execution. This approval does not allow deployment, Netlify, n8n activation, social account connection, credential use, posting, scheduling, analytics API use, paid tools, real client private data, production data, customer data, Lead Gen changes, AI Receptionist changes, Constitution changes, additional repositories, additional branches, additional pull requests, or any target repo action other than merging PR #1.
revocationPath: This approval is revoked, expired, cancelled, or invalidated when the owner says stop or revoke, the expiration passes, PR #82 is not merged into AG OS main, local AG OS main does not match origin/main, AG OS review records are missing from main, target PR #1 is closed, already merged before this action, not mergeable, has a different target repository, has a different head SHA than bf57520a6b08bf5fab9986adc2c9f7ae54b1e5bf, changes files outside README.md, package.json, index.html, src/main.js, src/styles.css, src/data/templates.js, src/lib/safety.js, and src/lib/status.js, validation or boot check fails, runtime tests fail, GitHub reports a conflict, an incident opens for this scope, any prohibited action becomes necessary, or the action expands beyond merging exactly target PR #1.

evidence.reference: Current thread owner approval granted to merge only target repo PR #1: gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system#1.
npm.cmd run validate, npm.cmd run boot:check, and node --test tests/*.test.mjs passed immediately before execution.
